arts.ttl: Newcastle United's next five games compared to Man City, Nottingham Forest and Chelsea
arts.sum: The Magpies had no response as the Reds took a step closer to the Premier League title, while the Toon stay in sixth after Man City defeated Tottenham Hotspur and Chelsea's win over Southampton. Newcastle United know they lost some ground on Wednesday night in the race for Champions League football after a 2-0 defeat to Liverpool at Anfield.

arts.ttl: What Lewis Hall did before Newcastle United defeat as Liverpool myth rubbished again
arts.sum: Before Wednesday night's 2-0 defeat to Liverpool, however, Hall attempted to explain away the myth that Newcastle are focused on anything but their Premier League and FA Cup exploits at present. Instead, Hall and his Newcastle United team-mates are attempting to focus on the task directly in front of them - despite lingering talk that one eye may already be on the Carabao Cup final in a matter of weeks.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot will appreciate Liverpool helping hand after being 'completely wrong'
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest took points off Arsenal to help Arne Slot's Liverpool extend their lead in the Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Arne Slot claims Liverpool players have silenced doubters with ‘mental strength’
arts.sum: Manager delighted after ‘people started to question us’ Praises on-field reaction in 2-0 victory over Newcastle Arne Slot claimed Liverpool silenced the doubters with victory over Newcastle, with an increased lead of 13 points at the top of the Premier League validating his decision to rest senior players in the FA Cup exit at Plymouth. Liverpool stretched their lead over Arsenal with a convincing defeat of Eddie Howe’s side, whom they face in the Carabao Cup final in 18 days’ time, to build on Sunday’s impressive win at Manchester City. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Mohamed Salah drops hint after Al-Hilal CONFIRMATION
arts.sum: Salah has previously dropped hints suggesting that he could leave the club, going so far as to tell fans about a lack of progress in his contract talks. "It's my last year at the club and I want to do something special for the city," he told Sky Sports when asked about his ambition to win the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s chase for preferred defensive option could be derailed by Man City
arts.sum: Liverpool have a long-held interest in Rayan Ait-Nouri, but their attempts to land him could be derailed by Man City’s pursuit of another highly-rated left-back. Empire of the Kop suggest that the Wolves man is the Reds preferred option for a new left-back signing, whilst Man United were also recently linked to the 23-year-old. arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai shows true colours with message to rival after Liverpool vs Newcastle goal
arts.sum: Dominik Szoboszlai was Liverpool's hero once again with a goal against Newcastle United

arts.ttl: “Liverpool suit him best” – Brighton player encouraged to pick Reds over Chelsea
arts.sum: Liverpool and Chelsea are among the clubs to be credited with interest in Brighton & Hove Albion’s Carlos Baleba. He arrived at The Amex in August 2023 and was in and out of Brighton’s starting lineup last season. The midfielder has cemented his place under Fabian Hürzeler this season and made 27 appearances in all The post “Liverpool suit him best” – Brighton player encouraged to pick Reds over Chelsea appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: I saw Alexander Isak's reaction after Newcastle decision as Howe makes choice
arts.sum: But it was not good news for Newcastle fans as Isak was ruled out of the match due to a groin injury. Alexander Isak had not kicked a ball at Anfield but he was arguably Newcastle United's most storied player last night.

arts.ttl: 'Robertson could be given Liverpool extension' - gossip
arts.sum: Andy Robertson reportedly could be handed a Liverpool extension, while Hibernian are apparently in talks over extending goalkeeper Jordan Smith's contract.
